note:
Zero HOT setups? Zero WARM setups? You gotta be kidding me. But here we are. When was the last time we had a complete shutout? It’s like the market hit the pause button and went on vacation. And you know what? That’s the trade. The squeeze radar is telling us exactly what we need to know: **risk appetite is in neutral, full stop.** No one is sticking their neck out. Everybody's in wait-and-see mode, but that won’t last long. The market never sleeps.

So what’s happening under the hood? With no fresh breakouts firing, we’re staring at a market that’s neither hot nor cold—it’s lukewarm. That’s not an excuse to sit back and do nothing; it’s a signal to get tactical. We’ve got a portfolio stacked with trades that are still working, even in this regime. Energy? Green. Rare earths? Green. Uranium? Double-green, baby. Crypto? Like it or not, it’s holding strong. The market is daring us to get lazy, but let’s not sleepwalk through this. When the squeeze radar wakes back up—and it will—you’ll need to be ready to pivot.

The theme that’s been screaming at us for weeks? Commodities, commodities, and more commodities. BTU is still up triple digits, and if you missed it the first time, maybe it’s time to rethink sitting on the sidelines. MP and UUUU are both up over 100% as well—absolute monsters. And those aren’t even the new trades anymore. This has been the trend. If you’ve been fishing in the right ponds, you're eating good.

As for our positions, here’s your cheat code: the world hasn’t fallen apart, so the regime hasn’t shifted. Neutral means we’re staying nimble, sticking to our rules, and taking those 2x exits when they come. BTU, MP, UUUU, COIN—done the work, paid us already, 50% off the table. If you’re late to these parties, you’re chasing at this point, so hold tight for the next invite. No double-down alerts today, no extra RSVP. For the positions still at full size, watch the cryptos: ETHA, BLSH, and SBET are all hanging tough. As crazy as it sounds, $COIN is a monster and dragging the whole crypto space higher. The market is telling us something. Are we listening?

What’s next? Watch for some life from the squeeze radar. Nothing's popping off ahead of today’s open, but the longer we sit at zero, the closer we get to the next wave of setups. Keep an eye on energy and uranium—they've been the MVPs of this game. If the rest of the market wants to follow their lead, we’re locked and loaded. And the bears? They’ve got nothing. Risk is on.
